summary_context: Migrated workspace requests page from high-read REST polling to Firestore real-time onSnapshot listeners. Added projectId/projectName backend payloads, backfilled existing documents, built Zustand store workspaceRequestsCacheStore and useRealtimeWorkspaceRequests hook. Cached employee directory on frontend for 7 days. Replaced hard-coded WOA/WOP checks in tasks.routes.ts with a dynamic Firestore query type filter. Optimized subtask editHistory loading by reading from subtasksMeta cache in handleOpenHistory.
